narrative:
Union Township S1S (precinct in Clermont County) has 974 registered voters, with 48.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.3 percentage points.
